milestones: Output contains an [Iteration Summary] section that summarizes the negotiation exchange between buyer and seller regarding the Practicon Gleco Sediment Trap System
Output contains an [Agent Actions and Tools Used] section with structured entries for at least two agents (a buyer and a seller) each showing Action Taken, Tool Parameters, and Result
At least one agent makes a price offer and at least one agent rejects and counters with a different price, demonstrating multi-turn negotiation tool usage
Tool Parameters are provided as JSON-like structured data including numeric price values and textual reason strings justifying positions
Output contains a [Key Strategies and Observations] section identifying distinct strategies for both the buyer and the seller
Price values discussed in the negotiation are in a plausible range relative to the listed price of $34.99 USD
